results.title: One Dollar Resume Review: Professional resume review for just $1 | Product Hunt
results.content:
vivek sharma

This feels like resume review done right built on real hiring insights, not guesswork. Smart way to democratize what elite companies have long optimized. [...] One Dollar Resume Review

@niraj\_sheladiya Thank you so much Niraj! Yeah, we wanted to help people get closer to building a top 1% resume and hence made this tool. Hope this helps a lot of people.

Germán Merlo
Build Check

Build Check

Hey Harsh!

It sounds really interesting. Applying for a new job can be stressing and you're bringing some light to the steps before. Hope many people can take the most of it.

All the best!

Anh Nguyen

I’ve seen so many talented candidates get overlooked simply because their resumes didn’t clearly communicate their value. The fact that this tool is built on insights from reviewing thousands of real applications makes it way more practical than the usual advice out there. Curious to see how it handles things like phrasing impact or role fit! [...] One Dollar Resume Review

@borja\_diazroig Thanks a ton Borja!   
  
All CVs are checked by an AI in this case. We have prepared this tool based on our own experience of running a recruiting firm and having helped 20+ companies build their teams.   
  
This tool does a far better job than all other tools out there, and we provide a lot of extra valuable suggestions like job recommendations, hackathons, etc. on the basis of the profile of the user.

Niraj Sheladiya

Kudos to @itsharshag idea! After reviewing thousands of resumes and working with top founders, you’ve channeled that experience into an AI tool that highlights common resume issues. Excited to see how it helps job seekers!

Harsh Agrawal
One Dollar Resume Review

One Dollar Resume Review

results.title: Resume Worded: Resume Worded is a searchable database of real resume lines. | Product Hunt
results.content:
14 views

•1 review

I can't remember a product experience I had that was as good as Resume Worded. I didn't know if my resume was good. I didn't have the confidence in it. But along came this tool. It guided me through the process of writing an effective one. It showed me the ins and outs of writing a STRONG resume, and not one that just looks good. After all its the interviews that matter, and this tool shows you how to get interviews. I can honestly say this tool was worth every penny. I wasn't paid to write this nor was I asked by the team. I just had to express my joy when a hiring manager told me today that I had one of the best, to the point CVs they'd seen in a while. This works, folks!

#### What's great

paid version value (5)resume feedback (5)

•1 review [...] Report

 14 views

•1 review

To say Resume Worded was helpful would be a massive understatement. It was a total gamechanger. I was really struggling with my job search, literally getting non stop rejected from every company. I uploaded my resume to Resume Worded, and realized it was a very subpar one. After making changes, specifically adding in accomplishments, removing issues like bad grammar and punctuation, I submitted my resume to a bunch of companies and got a very different, positive response. I've been complimented a ton on my resume from hiring managers, and I now help my friends with their resumes too ;) Btw, the newsletter is a total gem. Highly highly recommend.

#### What's great

resume feedback (5)newsletter (2)
